services.label: MODULES
services.headline: Three specialties. One standard.
services.subheadline: Every project receives the same surgical attention — whether it's an institutional site, a data pipeline, or a multiplayer system.

items.title: Next.js Sites & Systems
items.description: Modern architecture, measured performance, visual identity that converts. From landing pages to full SaaS platforms.

items.title: Data Science & ML
items.description: Data pipelines, predictive models, and executive dashboards. Turns raw data into business decisions.

items.title: Complete Web Systems
items.description: Robust backend, precise frontend, infrastructure that doesn't fail. Auth, payments, real-time — all integrated.

items.title: Game Development
items.description: Multiplayer games, custom mechanics, and game server architecture. Unity, C#, and high-performance backends.

cases.title: INCOCIL®
cases.description: Full migration from WordPress to Next.js for a hydraulic cylinder manufacturer. International presence for Hannover Messe 2026.

about.label: ABOUT
about.headline: 20 years old. Porto Alegre. No shortcuts.
about.bio: Jr. Data Science Analyst by day. Full-stack software engineer in spare time. Game developer when no one's watching. What ties it all together: obsession with well-built systems — whether it's an ML model, a Next.js architecture, or a multiplayer game's netcode.
about.philosophy: I don't deliver code. I deliver the gap between where your company is and where it needs to be.
